title: Microsoft plans first-ever voluntary employee buyout for up to 7% of U.S. workforce
summary: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.

summary: If a worker's years of service at Microsoft plus their age equals 70 or more, they will be eligible for a voluntary retirement buyout.

title: Dropbox Collaborates with GitHub to Reduce Monorepo Size from 87GB to 20GB
summary: Dropbox reduced its backend monorepo from 87GB to 20GB by optimizing Git delta compression in collaboration with GitHub. The changes improved clone times, CI performance, and developer velocity, highlighting how repository storage inefficiencies can impact large-scale engineering workflows. By Leela Kumili
